name: auth-email-verification
description: Email verification flow with resend countdown, optional code input, expiry timer, and success/expired states
postMessage:
Email verification installed!

Usage:
import { EmailVerification } from '@/components/auth-email-verification'

<EmailVerification
  email="user@example.com"
  status="pending"
  onResend={async (email) => { /* send verification */ }}
  onVerifyCode={async (code) => { /* validate */ }}
  onContinue={() => router.push('/dashboard')}
/>

Requires shadcn/ui: npx shadcn@latest add button input card label
